title: Recreate Results screen to match reference design (image-13.png)

requirements.text: Redesign frontend/src/pages/Results.tsx to exactly match the layout shown in image-13.png. The screen must have a dark background and display the following sections top to bottom: (1) A header row with back arrow, title 'Resultado da Análise', and subtitle 'Análise técnica de candles'; (2) Two side-by-side dark tiles — left tile shows a clock icon, 'TEMPO' label, the countdown timer in large bold white (e.g., '00:36'), and 'restante' subtitle; right tile shows a clock icon, 'ENTRAR ÀS' label, the entry time in large bold cyan/teal (e.g., '20:32'), and 'horário de entrada' subtitle; (3) A large full-width green banner for COMPRA (showing '↗ COMPRA' in large bold white text) or red banner for VENDA (showing '↙ VENDA'), with 'Tendência: ALTA • Confiança: 95%' on one line and a 'Força: forte' badge centered below it; (4) A 2×2 grid of dark tiles: top-left shows 'Tendência' label with a colored arrow icon and 'ALTA' value in green (or 'BAIXA' in red), top-right shows 'Precisão' label with a target icon and the precision percentage/value in cyan, bottom-left shows 'Volume' label with a bar chart icon and the volume value (e.g., 'Baixo') in purple, bottom-right shows 'Time Frame' label with a clock icon, the timeframe value (e.g., 'M1') in amber/orange bold, and a subtitle (e.g., '1 min/vela'); (5) Below the grid, display the uploaded chart image as a full-width (or near full-width) thumbnail with support/resistance overlay lines drawn on it. All text must be in Portuguese (Brazil).
acceptanceCriteria: Header displays back arrow, 'Resultado da Análise' title, and 'Análise técnica de candles' subtitle
Two side-by-side tiles at the top: left tile shows TEMPO with countdown timer in large white, right tile shows ENTRAR ÀS with entry time in large cyan/teal
Large full-width signal banner is green for COMPRA or red for VENDA with arrow symbol, trend, confidence, and força badge
2×2 info grid shows Tendência (colored arrow + value), Precisão (value in cyan), Volume (value in purple), Time Frame (value in amber with subtitle)
Chart thumbnail displayed below the grid at full or near-full width with support/resistance dashed lines overlaid
All text labels are in Portuguese (Brazil)
Dark background (#000 or near-black) used throughout
Countdown timer duration matches selected timeframe: M1=60s, M3=180s, M5=300s
Entry time ('ENTRAR ÀS') is computed as current time at page load plus the timeframe duration

requirements.text: Update the chart thumbnail display in Results.tsx so the uploaded screenshot is shown as a large, full-width (or near full-width) image below the 2×2 info grid — matching the reference design in image-13.png where the chart occupies the lower portion of the screen. Remove any previous small corner thumbnail placement. Retrieve the image data URL from sessionStorage under the 'chartImage' key and render it with the ChartOverlay component so support (green dashed) and resistance (red dashed) lines are drawn on top.
acceptanceCriteria: Chart image is displayed full-width (or near full-width) below the 2×2 info grid
ChartOverlay component renders green dashed support lines and red dashed resistance lines on the chart
A directional arrow on the right edge of the chart indicates COMPRA (up) or VENDA (down)
Image is retrieved from sessionStorage key 'chartImage'
No small corner thumbnail is shown; the chart section is a prominent scrollable area

requirements.text: Update the Tendência tile in the 2×2 grid of Results.tsx to display a colored upward/downward arrow icon inline with the ALTA or BAIXA label — green arrow for ALTA, red arrow for BAIXA — matching the visual style in image-13.png. Update the Precisão tile to display its value (percentage or Baixa/Média/Alta label) in cyan/teal text. Update the Volume tile to display its value in purple text. Update the Time Frame tile to display the timeframe value (M1/M3/M5) in amber/orange bold text with a subtitle line below it (e.g., '1 min/vela' for M1, '3 min/vela' for M3, '5 min/vela' for M5).
acceptanceCriteria: Tendência tile shows colored arrow (green ↗ for ALTA, red ↘ for BAIXA) inline with the value
Precisão tile value is rendered in cyan/teal
Volume tile value is rendered in purple
Time Frame tile value is rendered in amber/orange bold with subtitle '1 min/vela', '3 min/vela', or '5 min/vela' matching the selected timeframe
All tile labels are in Portuguese

requirements.text: Update the signal banner in Results.tsx to display inline within the banner: the signal arrow and label ('↗ COMPRA' or '↙ VENDA') in large bold white text, a middle line showing 'Tendência: [value] • Confiança: [XX]%', and a third line showing a centered pill badge 'Força: [forte/média/fraca]' — all within the green (COMPRA) or red (VENDA) full-width banner. This matches the layout visible in image-13.png. The banner must span the full width of the screen with generous vertical padding.
acceptanceCriteria: Signal banner is full-width, green for COMPRA, red for VENDA
First line: arrow symbol + signal label in large bold white
Second line: 'Tendência: [value] • Confiança: [XX]%'
Third line: centered 'Força: [forte/média/fraca]' badge
Banner has generous vertical padding giving it prominent visual weight

constraints: All user-facing text must remain in Portuguese (Brazil)
Do not modify immutable paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui
Do not break existing countdown timer logic, WIN/LOSS buttons, or sessionStorage data flow
Maintain dark mode as default; light mode must also render correctly
nonGoals: Changing the backend schema or Motoko actor
Adding new analysis logic or modifying localCandleAnalysis.ts
Redesigning any screen other than Results.tsx
Adding new settings or configuration fields
